findings.evidence: Line 86 proves `Measurable ... (shift α)` directly; lines 94-96 prove `Measurable ... ((shift α)^[n])`, whose `n = 1` case is the same map.
findings.fix: Move `measurable_shift_iterate_shiftInvariantSigma` before the one-step lemma and prove `measurable_shift_shiftInvariantSigma` by `simpa` from `measurable_shift_iterate_shiftInvariantSigma 1`, or drop the separate one-step lemma if the roadmap name is not needed.
findings.issue: `measurable_shift_shiftInvariantSigma` is the `n = 1` case of `measurable_shift_iterate_shiftInvariantSigma` proved just below, so the PR carries a duplicated special-case proof.

summary: One special-case measurability proof duplicates the iterate-level theorem in the same file. The API should prove the iterate statement once and derive the one-step shift statement from it.
